Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 29, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT JENNIFER NGAI DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Moving party fails to cite any authority in the habitability/landlord-tenant context standing for the proposition that one who operates and manages the premises (Complaint paragraph 7) is not liable to tenants for failure to provide/maintain habitable premises. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: DOUGLAS WONG VS. QING MEI HUA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Allowing Enrty Of Judgment For Daily Damages And Atty Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 29, 2015, line 6. PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS WONG's Motion For Order Allowing Enrty Of Judgment For Daily Damages And Attorney Fees GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion for Attorney's fees and Costs is GRANTED as requested. Plaintiff is the prevailing party is the unlawful detainer based on expiration of Lease. Motion for entry of judgment for daily damages is denied. The amount of daily damages, if any, is a disputed issue in this case that has been converted to a civil action by operation of law when possession was no longer at issue. = (501/RBU)
